data.title: US SEC Chairman: Key measures to be introduced in the coming months include investment contract recognition and exemptions for innovative tokenized securities trading.
data.description: The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) website published the discussion transcripts of Chairman Paul Atkins at the ETHDenver conference, revealing that the following issues will be considered in the coming weeks and months: 1. Developing a framework to explain how to view crypto assets bound by investment contracts, including how such contracts are entered into and terminated; 2. Establishing innovation exemptions to facilitate limited trading of certain tokenized securities on new platforms, with an eye toward establishing a long-term regulatory framework; 3. Introducing a rulemaking proposal aimed at establishing a reasonable pathway to raising funds through the sale of crypto assets; 4. Letters of no action and exemptions to provide more clarity, including addressing wallets that do not require registration under the Securities Exchange Act; 5. Rulemaking regarding broker-dealers holding non-securities crypto assets (including payments in stablecoins); 6. Developing rules on modernizing transfer agents to accommodate the role blockchain can play in record keeping; 7. Providing additional guidance and letters of no action to help the crypto community understand how existing rules apply to unique realities.

data.title: Ethereum Tokenization Soared 315% to $17B, Market Share Hit 34%
data.description:
Key Insights Capital allocation in the digital asset market is approaching a seismic change. Recent statistics show a significant increase in institutional activity related to blockchain-based assets. Ethereum has accelerated this transformation, with greater momentum and scale than ever before
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2026/02/18/ethereum-tokenization-soared-315-to-17b-market-share-hit-34/

data.title: Avalanche in Northern California Results in Multiple Fatalities and Missing Persons
data.description: An avalanche occurred in the mountainous region of Northern California on Tuesday morning, impacting a skiing group of 15 individuals. According to Ming Pao, local police reported on Wednesday that eight people have been confirmed dead, and one person remains missing as search efforts continue. Six individuals have been rescued.

data.title: Federal Reserve Backs Prediction Markets for Inflation Forecasting Amid Regulatory Challenges
data.description: Federal Reserve researchers have endorsed macro-focused prediction markets as effective tools for real-time forecasting of inflation and interest rates, suggesting they surpass traditional measures. According to NS3.AI, these markets offer a more dynamic approach to economic predictions. However, state regulators, particularly in Nevada, are intensifying enforcement actions against certain prediction markets due to concerns over gambling. Industry experts highlight that ongoing regulatory uncertainty may hinder the liquidity and stability required for these markets to reach their full potential as forecasting tools.

data.title: Polymarket and Substack have entered into an exclusive partnership to integrate market data into news content.
data.description: Polymarket has announced an exclusive partnership with Substack. According to the announcement, Substack authors will be able to natively integrate Polymarket market data into their content, providing real-time market forecasts to support news reporting. Both companies stated that this move aims to embed predictive market data into the writing process, providing content creators with data-driven support.

data.title: Clarity Act Approval Probability Rises to 90% on Polymarket
data.description: Crypto Rover posted on X that the probability of the Clarity Act's approval has surged to 90% on Polymarket. This development has sparked significant interest and discussion within the cryptocurrency community. The Clarity Act, which aims to provide clearer regulations for digital assets, has been a topic of debate among policymakers and industry stakeholders. The increased probability on Polymarket, a popular prediction market platform, suggests growing confidence in the Act's passage. Observers are closely monitoring the situation as it unfolds, given the potential implications for the cryptocurrency sector.

data.title: SEC Chair Outlines Crypto Regulation Direction at ETHDenver
data.description:
The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has released a speech by Chair Paul Atkins at the ETHDenver conference, detailing the agency's approach to cryptocurrency regulation. According to ChainCatcher, the SEC plans to clarify the framework for determining when crypto assets constitute investment contracts, including their formation and termination mechanisms.

The SEC is considering the introduction of innovation exemptions, which would allow limited pilot trading of certain tokenized securities under restricted conditions. This includes trading on new platforms like automated market makers, aimed at gathering experience for a long-term regulatory framework.

The agency also intends to advance rulemaking on various topics, such as the financing paths for crypto assets, the modernization of broker-dealer custody and transfer agent rules for non-securities crypto assets, including payment stablecoins. Additionally, the SEC will continue to provide clarity through no-action letters and exemption orders for scenarios like wallets and user interfaces that do not require registration.

Paul Atkins emphasized that regulators should not react to short-term price fluctuations. The SEC's role is to ensure adequate information disclosure and clear rules, allowing market participants to make decisions in a transparent environment, rather than protecting prices.

data.title: Eric Trump Says This Type Of Crypto Could 'Arguably' End Up Saving The Dollar: Will Bring In 'Literally' Trillions To US Economy
data.description:
Eric Trump, co-founder of the World Liberty Financial (CRYPTO: WLFI) platform, said Wednesday that stablecoins could inject trillions into the U. S. economy and safeguard the dollar. 
source: https://www.benzinga.com/crypto/cryptocurrency/26/02/50710537/eric-trump-says-this-type-of-crypto-could-arguably-end-up-saving-the-dollar-will-bring-in-literally-trillions-to-us-economy?utm_source=cryptopanic.com&utm_campaign=partner_feed&utm_medium=referral

data.title: Moonwell: A recovery plan has been submitted to the governance forum and partial restitution has been initiated.
data.description: Following a misconfiguration of an oracle that resulted in approximately $1.78 million in bad debt, DeFi lending protocol Moonwell released an incident response update on the X platform. The update stated that a recovery plan has been published on the governance forum, which includes integrating the Moonwell Apollo (MFAM) community into the Moonwell ecosystem (WELL). The Moonwell Apollo Treasury will immediately initiate partial compensation, with continued compensation through protocol revenue. Furthermore, MFAM holders and stkWELL stakers are proposed to receive compensation at a 1:1.5 ratio (MFAM:stkWELL).

data.title: U.S. Federal Judge Overturns Immigration Detention Policy
data.description: A federal judge in Riverside, California, has overturned a decision by the Board of Immigration Appeals that supported the Trump administration's policy of mandatory detention of immigrants without bail. According to Jin10, Judge Sunshine Sykes ruled that the administration failed to comply with her previous order declaring the detention policy illegal. This decision marks a significant legal challenge to the current immigration enforcement practices under U.S. President Donald Trump.

data.title: Peruvian Lawmakers Appoint Jose Maria Balcazar as Interim President
data.description: Peruvian lawmakers have appointed Jose Maria Balcazar as the country's new interim president. Bloomberg posted on X, this decision follows the resignation of Jose Jeri, who served for four months before stepping down. Balcazar's appointment continues a pattern of short-lived presidencies in Peru, as the nation grapples with political instability. The new interim leader faces the challenge of navigating the country's ongoing political and economic issues.

data.title: WLFI Surges 10% Following Major Stablecoin Pilot Announcement
data.description: WLFI experienced a significant 10% increase after announcing a partnership with a $3.5 trillion asset servicer to pilot its USD1 stablecoin. According to NS3.AI, this development underscores strong institutional interest in WLFI, even as Bitcoin and Ethereum continue to hover near multi-week lows. The collaboration highlights a positive trend for WLFI amid the broader softness in the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: Samsung Electronics Shares Reach New Heights Amid AI Memory Chip Price Negotiations
data.description: Samsung Electronics shares have surged to a new record high following reports from local media about the company's negotiations for its latest AI memory chip. Bloomberg posted on X that the firm is discussing a price increase of up to 30% compared to the previous generation of chips. This development highlights Samsung's strategic move to capitalize on advancements in artificial intelligence technology, potentially boosting its market position and profitability. The news has sparked investor interest, contributing to the rise in share value.

data.title: Nissan Embraces Competition from Chinese Automakers in Latin America
data.description: Nissan's top executive in Latin America has expressed a positive outlook on the entry of Chinese automakers into the region. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that the increased competition is seen as a beneficial force that will strengthen the automotive industry. The executive believes that the presence of Chinese companies will drive innovation and improvement across the sector, ultimately benefiting consumers and manufacturers alike. This perspective aligns with Nissan's strategy to adapt and thrive amidst evolving market dynamics.

data.title: STOCKS | Wesfarmers Shares Decline Following Disappointing Retail Performance
data.description: Australian conglomerate Wesfarmers experienced a significant drop in its share value, marking the largest decline since October. Bloomberg posted on X that the company's key retail units underperformed in the first half, failing to meet analyst expectations. This downturn has raised concerns among investors about the future prospects of Wesfarmers' retail operations. The company's performance is being closely monitored as stakeholders assess the impact on its overall market position.

data.title: Huma Finance Set to Unlock Tokens on February 26
data.description: Huma Finance is scheduled to unlock approximately 12.626 million tokens on February 26 at 13:00 UTC+8. According to ChainCatcher, this token release is valued at around $1.72 million, based on data from the Web3 asset data platform RootData.

data.title: MultiBank to Unlock 46 Million Tokens on February 26
data.description: MultiBank (MBG) is set to unlock approximately 46 million tokens on February 26 at 8 a.m. UTC+8. According to ChainCatcher, this token release is part of the schedule outlined by the Web3 asset data platform RootData. The tokens are valued at around $13.95 million.
